---
about:
  id: Resume-Main
  template: broadside
  image: Headshot1.png
  image-width: 600px

format:
  html:
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 0px
      body-width: 1200px
      margin-width: 0px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
    max-width: 1600px
---

::: {#Resume-Main}
**University of Minnesota Medical School, Minneapolis, MN**\
**Graduate Research Assistant \| Advanced Research and Diagnostic Laboratory (Oct. 2023 -- May 2024)**\
As a Graduate Research Assistant at the Advanced Research and Diagnostic Laboratory, I was responsible for a project exploring biomarkers in the HRS study. My work involved performing comprehensive analyses for biomarkers related to Dementia and Alzheimer's. I developed group classifications based on plasma biomarkers elevation and conducted differential gene expression analysis using these biomarker groups, recording cognitive decline. I created models examining cognitive scores and output from OLINK and Quanterix machines, and explored the validation of a previously published aging clock based on ARIC study data with HRS data.

**University of St. Thomas, St. Paul and Minneapolis, MN**\
**ITS Support Services Intern & Service Desk Technician (June 2022 -- Aug. 2023)**\
During my time as an ITS Support Services Intern & Service Desk Technician, I received the ITS Outstanding Student Award. I developed and maintained a Python application crucial to organizational operations, and established and updated digital signage across service desks and various sites. I mentored junior students, fostering their skill enhancement and professional growth. I oversaw departmental ticketing, resolving over 4500 tickets over two years, and authored key technical documentation and procedural guides for The Tech Desk, ITS staff, students, and faculty. I led multiple efficiency enhancement projects, streamlining processes and operational workflows, and served as an essential operational cornerstone, diligently addressing potential vulnerabilities.

**ITS Rollout Intern (May 2022 -- Sept. 2022)**\
As the ITS Rollout Intern, I assumed the role of sole successor to a formerly ten-member team. I managed the setup of over 1500 computers, which was 2.5 times the standard per year. I assisted with inventory maintenance and upkeep following replacement and setup.

**ITS Service Desk Senior Student Technician (Aug. 2021 -- Jun. 2022)**\
In my role as the ITS Service Desk Senior Student Technician, I functioned as the initial contact for student workers at phone centers and walk-up desks. I wrote procedural documentation adhered to by students and staff within ITS.
:::

|                    |               |                    |
|:------------------:|:-------------:|:------------------:|
|                    | **Expertise** |                    |
| Data Visualization |       R       |   Data Pipelines   |
|   Data Cleaning    |  Programming  | Data Communication |

|                          |   **Proficiencies**    |                            |
|:----------------------:|:--------------------:|:------------------------:|
|    Applied Statistics    |     Data Analysis      |         Databases          |
| Geospatial Visualization |    Data Engineering    |    Predictive Modeling     |
|     Machine Learning     | Computational Biology  | Differential Gene Analysis |
|   Regression Analysis    | Research Methodologies |        Data Privacy        |
|    Project Management    |          GIS           |     Technical Writing      |
|                          | **Languages & Tools**  |                            |
|            R             |         Python         |           Shiny            |
|          Quarto          |        Markdown        |           API's            |
|           Git            |         Linux          |            Bash            |
|          Office          |       PowerShell       |            SQL             |

|            |                   |      **Strengths**      |                     |           |
|:-------------:|:-------------:|:-------------:|:-------------:|:-------------:|
| Creativity | Critical Thinking | Complex Problem-solving | Pattern Recognition | Integrity |

<a href="Resume_JonathanBarnes.pdf" download class="btn btn-primary"> <i class="bi bi-save"></i> Download Resume </a>
